terms.definition: Anthropic's AI assistant and model family for language, reasoning, analysis, and coding—available via chat apps, APIs, and developer tools.
The AI safety and research company that builds Claude; a public-benefit corporation focused on developing reliable, steerable AI systems.
A neural network trained on large text corpora to model language—predicting and generating tokens—which powers assistants like Claude.
The user-facing Claude product layer (chat UI or API session) that accepts messages and returns model-generated responses.
Anthropic's training approach that uses principles and critique to steer models toward helpful, harmless, and honest behavior; introduced in sibling topics.
